description: This pipeline is designed to process and analyze microscopic images, specifically focusing on the detection and labeling of macrophages and their interactions with spores. It begins by annotating and filtering image data, followed by a series of processing steps that enhance and transform the images to facilitate analysis. The pipeline then applies various algorithms to identify and label macrophages, including those with adherent or phagocytosed spores, and generates output files containing these labeled images. Additionally, it performs quality control checks and exports the results in multiple formats for further evaluation and visualization. Overall, the pipeline aims to provide a comprehensive understanding of macrophage-spore interactions through automated image analysis.

fff1e3bc-454b-48b2-ab76-a86ba11cc5e5.name: ij1-roi-to-rgb
fff1e3bc-454b-48b2-ab76-a86ba11cc5e5.description:
Converts ROI lists to masks. The line and fill color is stored within the ROI themselves. This algorithm needs a reference image that provides the output sizes. If you do not have a reference image, you can use the unreferenced variant.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

a4e6fec3-739f-4da9-94d9-724ee1afaa2e.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExcludeLabelsOnEdges
a4e6fec3-739f-4da9-94d9-724ee1afaa2e.description:
Removes all labels from a label map which touch the edges of the image (in X, Y and Z if the image is 3D).

Remaining label elements are renumbered afterwards.

Parameters: Image label_map_input, ByRef Image label_map_destination
Available for: 2D, 3D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

2a4946ca-741f-4593-8899-37d95d207e4c.name: annotate-with-source-slot
2a4946ca-741f-4593-8899-37d95d207e4c.description: Annotates the data with the name or custom label of the source slot. Please note that this node cannot resolve multiple input slots, as, for optimization purposes, the information where data is coming from is deleted.

f68686bb-cfcf-4194-a2de-76f6bae7abc4.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
f68686bb-cfcf-4194-a2de-76f6bae7abc4.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.

408cc81f-f9ae-4848-96c8-bf2f34f92df1.name: ij1-roi-set-properties
408cc81f-f9ae-4848-96c8-bf2f34f92df1.description: Sets properties of all Roi to a user-defined value.

6c37d3a8-832c-479a-af9f-8cbe3f54c897.name: iji-export-image-v2
6c37d3a8-832c-479a-af9f-8cbe3f54c897.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f098bd5b-7742-4e6d-9129-7ebfa79f2e25.name: ij1-roi-to-labels-expression
f098bd5b-7742-4e6d-9129-7ebfa79f2e25.description:
Converts ROI and an optional reference image into a label image. Each ROI is assigned its own label. Alternatively, the label can be set generated from an expression. If no reference image is provided, the dimensions are estimated from the ROI. The background color (where no ROI is located) is zero.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
